Off Calendar Mar-17-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dorothy White in Pro Per.

Ms. White stated that she will meet with Dennis Vann on March 19 to see if he will represent her. The Court indicated that the hearing set on March 26 will remain on calendar. Ms. White asked for a continuance for the hearing on March 26. The Court declined to continue the hearing without the other party present. This status is taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel - Civil
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Justin Goodwin for and with Dorothy White.

Ms. White stated that she has not had any success with obtaining another Lawyer. The Court granted the Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel (subject to review of the order). The Court advised Ms. White of the motions that are on calendar for March 26, 2014 and that responses are needed. Status of representation and status of the motions was set for March 17, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Aug-29-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Frank Moore for Belva Watson (Respondent/Moving Party). Justin Goodwin for and with Dorothy White (Petitioner).

Mr. Moore has intent to present oral argument on the equitable tolling of the statute of limitations issue on claims against LaVerne Watson. The Court clarified that the ruling applied to Leroy Watson only. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED PETITION TO RECOVER REAL AND PERSONAL PROPERTY BELONGING TO DECEDENT AND FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF is sustained in part. Petitioner is granted leave to amend the First Amended Petition. Amended petition must be filed with the court within 10 court days from the scheduled hearing date. Mr. Moore to prepare an order.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. Not Reported.
